module.name: max-function-lines
module.description: Enforce a maximum number of lines per function body.

scenarios.name: should allow a function whose body is within the configured line limit
scenarios.given: a function whose body has fewer lines than the configured maximum

scenarios.name: should allow an empty function body
scenarios.given: a function with an empty block body

scenarios.name: should report when a function body exceeds the configured maximum
scenarios.given: a function whose body has more lines than the configured maximum
scenarios.then: a maxFunctionLines violation is reported on the function node

scenarios.name: should report for arrow functions that exceed the limit
scenarios.given: an arrow function whose body exceeds the maximum line count
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the arrow function
